title: Investment Analyst
description:
GEICO is a Fortune 500 car insurance company serving 13M+ policy holders. We've become synonymous with affordable insurance.

We're seeking a Investment Analyst to join our Insurance team in Washington. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Research and analyze investment opportunities across public equities and fixed income securities
Develop financial models and valuation analyses to support investment decisions
Monitor portfolio performance and prepare performance reports for leadership
Analyze company financial statements and assess investment risk/return profiles
Present investment recommendations to the investment committee
Stay current on market trends, economic conditions, and industry developments

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in investment management, equity research, or financial analysis
certifications: CFA Level I or II, or Series 7/63 preferred
